name: flash-socket-server-monorepo
description: Clean-room preservation runtime for legacy Flash MMOs

scripts.build: node scripts/validate-cleanliness.js && npm run build --workspace=@flash-socket-server/core && npm run build --workspace=@flash-socket-server/asset-indexer && npm run build --workspace=@flash-socket-server/compat-doctor && npm run build --workspace=@flash-socket-server/compat-matrix && npm run build --workspace=@flash-socket-server/flash-policy && npm run build --workspace=@flash-socket-server/sfs-emulator && npm run build --workspace=@flash-socket-server/http-gateway && npm run build --workspace=@flash-socket-server/runtime-adapters && npm run build --workspace=@flash-socket-server/cli
